header.subtitle: Set, drag and adjust your weekly sharing tasks
header.title: Weekly Task Schedule

section.description: Manage your weekly computing tasks with ease. Double-click the timeline to create tasks, drag to reposition, and resize using the handles. Tasks automatically activate full sharing mode and revert to your previous settings when completed.
section.title: About Scheduled Tasks

schedule.tips: Tip: Double-click to add, drag to move, pull handles to resize, and click × to delete. The vertical line shows current time, hover to see exact times.

warning.message: Without scheduled tasks, you'll need to manage sharing manually, potentially missing out on earnings during idle time. Set up a smart schedule to maximize your income.

auto_share.description: Let your computer contribute while you're away. Pick how long to wait after inactivity before sharing starts. This way, you get the best of both worlds - maximum sharing without slowing you down when you're actually using your computer."
auto_share.title: Share When Idle

autostart.description: Launch automatically when your computer starts up, so you never miss out on sharing opportunities. No manual startup needed - just set it and forget it.

modal.impact: Once your subscription expires, you will lose access to all premium features.
modal.message: We're truly sad to see you go. Just so you know, your premium features will remain active until your plan ends.
modal.reminder: Don't worry, you can always come back and resubscribe. We'll be here!

answer.cancel: Yes, you can cancel your subscription anytime in the member center. After cancellation, you can continue using member services until the current billing cycle ends. No refunds for already charged fees, and no renewal for the next billing cycle.
answer.commercial: Commercial licensing allows you to use generated images for commercial purposes, including but not limited to: advertising, product packaging, brand design, social media content, etc. Please refer to the commercial licensing agreement for specific rights and restrictions. Different membership levels have varying commercial authorization scopes.
answer.credits: Image credits are universal points for AI image generation. Each image consumes different credits based on resolution and quality. Basic 1024x1024 resolution costs about 10 credits, with higher resolution and quality requiring more credits accordingly.
answer.privacy: To promote community interaction and creative sharing, images generated by free users are displayed on the explore page by default. For privacy, you can upgrade to premium membership where all paid members can enable privacy mode to ensure your creations don't appear on others' explore pages. All images must still comply with our community guidelines.
